description: IMPORTANT: THIS PROBLEM USES IRREGULAR RULES. HELP YOUR OPPONENT WITH YOUR FIRST MOVE. If you dislike irregular rules problems, just skip this problem. Please flag and/or comment if there is a mistake. (Note: I'm quite sure I've covered all of the correct variations; tell me if there are any incorrect variations that I should add.)
sgf:
(
;
AB[rp][qp][qq][qr]
AW[rm][ro][qo][po][pp][pq][pr][nr]
C[IMPORTANT: Read the introduction. White seeks to help Black make the L-group alive. Play ONE move that makes Black alive with territory (no seki).][FORCE]
LB[on:T][rq:A][sq:B][rr:C][sr:D][rs:E][ss:F]
TR[rp][qp][qq][qr]





(
; W[on] AB[rm][ro][qo][po][pp][pq][pr][nr] AW[rp][qp][qq][qr]; B[on] C[The colors have swapped. Please demonstrate how the L-group can live.]
(; W[sr]; B[rs] C[Miai to kill.] TR[qs][sp])
(; W[rs]; B[sr] C[Miai to kill.] TR[rr][sq])
(; W[rr]; B[sq] C[Miai to kill.] TR[qs][sp])
(; W[sp]; B[qs] C[Miai to kill.] TR[rs][sr])
(; W[qs]; B[sp] C[Miai to kill.] TR[rs][sr])
)




(
; W[rq] AB[rm][ro][qo][po][pp][pq][pr][nr] AW[rp][qp][qq][qr]; B[rq] C[The colors have swapped. Please demonstrate how the L-group can live.]
(; W[sp]; B[qs])
(; W[sq]; B[rr])
(; W[rr]; B[sq] (; W[sp]; B[qs])(; W[sr] C[RIGHT]))
)






(
; W[sq] AB[rm][ro][qo][po][pp][pq][pr][nr] AW[rp][qp][qq][qr]; B[sq] C[The colors have swapped. Please demonstrate how the L-group can live.]
(; W[sp]; B[qs])
)





(
; W[rr] AB[rm][ro][qo][po][pp][pq][pr][nr] AW[rp][qp][qq][qr]; B[rr] C[The colors have swapped. Please demonstrate how the L-group can live.]
(; W[qs]; B[sp])
(; W[rs]; B[sr])
)







(
; W[sr] AB[rm][ro][qo][po][pp][pq][pr][nr] AW[rp][qp][qq][qr]; B[sr] C[The colors have swapped. Please demonstrate how the L-group can live.]
(; W[qs]; B[sp])
(; W[sp]; B[qs])
(; W[rr]; B[sq])
)





(
; W[rs] AB[rm][ro][qo][po][pp][pq][pr][nr] AW[rp][qp][qq][qr]; B[rs] C[The colors have swapped. Please demonstrate how the L-group can live.]
(; W[qs]; B[rr])
(; W[rr]; B[qs])
(; W[sp]; B[qs])
)







(
; W[ss] AB[rm][ro][qo][po][pp][pq][pr][nr] AW[rp][qp][qq][qr]; B[ss] C[The colors have swapped. Please demonstrate how the L-group can live.]
(; W[sr]; B[sp]; W[rs] C[RIGHT])
(; W[rs]; B[sr])
(; W[rr]; B[sq])

)
)
